detectors.description:

	- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Corol.sol#617)
	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Corol.sol#619)

[Corol.sendETHToFee(uint256)](Corol.sol#L615-L621) sends eth to arbitrary user

	- [_marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2))](Corol.sol#L619)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Corol._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Corol.sol#467-595):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Corol.sol#563)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Corol.sol#609)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Corol.sol#569)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Corol.sol#617)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Corol.sol#619)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Corol.sol#591)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Corol.sol#721)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Corol.sol#701)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Corol.sol#703)
	Corol._rOwned (Corol.sol#231) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Corol._takeTeam(uint256) (Corol.sol#715-723)
	- Corol._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Corol.sol#697-711)
	- Corol.balanceOf(address) (Corol.sol#347-351)
	- Corol.constructor(address,address) (Corol.sol#293-311)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Corol.sol#591)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Corol.sol#729)
	Corol._rTotal (Corol.sol#243) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Corol._getCurrentSupply() (Corol.sol#795-805)
	- Corol._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Corol.sol#727-733)
	- Corol.constructor(address,address) (Corol.sol#293-311)
	- Corol.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Corol.sol#403-411)

Corol._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Corol.sol#467-595) uses timestamp for comparisons

	- require(bool)(buycooldown[to] < block.timestamp) (Corol.sol#497)
	- require(bool)(sellcooldown[from] < block.timestamp) (Corol.sol#513)
	- firstsell[from] + (86400) < block.timestamp (Corol.sol#515)

detectors.description: Corol._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Corol.sol#467-595) has a high cyclomatic complexity (14).

Version constraint ^0.8.4 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.4 (Corol.sol#9)
